label: 85mm portrait
descriptor: 85mm focal length compresses background, flattering for faces, typical aperture f/1.4-f/2.8 for shallow depth of field, subject distance 2-3m, narrow field of view (~28 degrees).

label: 28mm wide environmental
descriptor: 28mm focal length includes environment, slight wide-angle distortion at edges, typical aperture f/4-f/8 for landscape, subject distance 1-5m, wide field of view (~75 degrees).

label: 100mm macro
descriptor: 100mm macro lens at minimum focus distance achieves 1:1 magnification, very shallow depth of field (mm-scale), typical aperture f/8-f/11 to maintain detail across the subject.

label: 200mm telephoto compression
descriptor: 200mm focal length strongly compresses spatial relationships, subject distance 5-10m, narrow field of view (~12 degrees), prone to motion blur without stabilization.

label: 16mm ultra-wide
descriptor: 16mm ultra-wide produces strong barrel distortion and exaggerated foreground, very wide field of view (~98 degrees), keeps near subjects sharp at small apertures.
